personality_one_liner: A clean, modern, and appetizing iOS-native layout with warm, vibrant coral accents that evoke freshness and speed.

spacing.rule: Generous vertical breathing room. Use 16px (lg) outer margins. Do not cluster cards; use space-between for grids.

do's: Use glass on bottom tab bar, floating cart summaries, and sticky sticky headers over scrolling content.
Use glass on floating 'Add to cart' primary CTAs.
dont's: Do not use glass on standard product cards or list items.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Discover promos, popular food items, and categories in a scrollable, appetizing feed.

states.empty: Illustration of a basket + 'Aucun produit disponible.'

screens.layout: A vertical ScrollView. Start with a prominent hero section (featured promo) with a gradient scrim and text. Follow with horizontally scrolling categories (chips or tinted icon containers), and a grid of popular items. Leave bottom padding for the tab bar.

screens.name: Catalog
screens.purpose: Browse products (grocery + restaurant) with search and category filters.
screens.layout: Sticky header with search bar and filter chips (glass effect). 2-column grid for products using space-between. Each product card has an image, price, title, and a small '+' button. Include a floating 'View Cart' mini-bar at the bottom if items are in cart.

screens.name: Product Detail
screens.purpose: Show full product info and allow quantity adjustment before adding to cart.
screens.layout: Large full-width image at the top with a top-to-bottom gradient scrim for the back button. Content area below with title, price, description. A sticky glass footer containing quantity selector and a primary 'Ajouter au panier' button.

screens.name: Cart
screens.purpose: Review items, adjust quantities, and see transparent pricing before checkout.

states.empty: Empty shopping bag illustration + 'Votre panier est vide' + 'Découvrir nos produits' button.

screens.layout: List of cart items (image, title, price, +/- stepper). Below the list, a pricing breakdown (Sous-total, Livraison, Total). Sticky bottom CTA 'Passer la commande'.

screens.name: Checkout
screens.purpose: Simulate the guest checkout process (address and validation).
screens.layout: Single-column form for delivery address. Clean input fields with labels above. A final order summary and a sticky 'Confirmer la commande' (cash on delivery / sim) button.

screens.name: Order History
screens.layout: Simple list of order cards. Each card shows order date, total amount, and status (e.g., Livré).

empty_cart.alt: Empty white shopping bags on neutral background

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow 1 iOS-Native Clean layout principles: generous spacing, clean typography, avoid clutter.
Do NOT use emoji anywhere in the UI. Use Ionicons.
Implement a bottom floating mini-cart summary in the Catalog screen if there are items in the cart (to allow quick checkout navigation).
On the Product Detail screen, ensure the hero image uses a gradient scrim to keep the back button readable.
For the Checkout form, use a single column layout with labels above the inputs inside a KeyboardAvoidingView.
Make sure primary CTAs (like 'Ajouter au panier' or 'Commander') are sticky at the bottom, using a glass container or solid surface background to separate them from scrolling content.
Maintain the French language (fr) across all UI copies as requested.
